name: Creepy Vision
short_description: Creepy Vision is an atmospheric indie horror with puzzles and dynamic levels. Explore a distorted dimension, avoid deadly traps, and find a way out while reality itself keeps changing around you.
detailed_description:
Creepy Vision is an atmospheric indie horror game where the player finds themselves trapped in a mysterious and hostile dimension. Here, space is distorted, environments shift, and every mistake can be fatal.

You must explore unsettling locations, solve puzzles, and search for a path to freedom, relying on your perception, reflexes, and ability to adapt to a constantly changing world.

Key Features

🔹 Atmospheric horror full of tension
Dark environments, unsettling sounds, and a constant feeling of unease follow you at every step.

🔹 Dynamic levels
The environment can change as you progress, creating the sense of an unstable and living reality.

🔹 Puzzles and deadly traps
You’ll need more than courage — observe carefully, think fast, and avoid lethal mechanisms.

🔹 Minimalistic yet expressive visual style
Distorted space and lighting enhance the feeling of anxiety and disorientation.

🔹 Controller and multiple language support
Play using different control methods with support for multiple languages.

🩸 Are you ready to escape?

Every step can bring you closer to freedom — or lead to your demise.
Creepy Vision will test how long you can keep your composure in a world that doesn’t want you to leave.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Russian*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
